tables.description: Subject ID, age, sex, race, medical history of breast cancer of mother, sister or daughter, estrogen receptor status, and progesterone receptor status of participants with or without breast cancer and involved in the "The African American Breast Cancer Epidemiology and Risk (AMBER) Consortium Study" project.

variables.name: AGE
variables.description: Case age at diagnosis or control age, categorized in to 5 year age groups

variables.name: ERSTAT
variables.description: Estrogen Receptor status

variables.name: FAMHX
variables.description: Mother, sister or daughter diagnosed with breast cancer

variables.name: PRSTAT
variables.description: Progesterone Receptor status

variables.name: RACE
variables.description: Race

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Gender

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Unique ID for the subjects in the AMBER Collaborative Study

tables.description: Sample ID, body site where sample was obtained, analyte type, tumor status of sample, histological type of sample, and genotyping center of participants with or without breast cancer and involved in the "The African American Breast Cancer Epidemiology and Risk (AMBER) Consortium Study" project.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: GENOTYPING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted genotyping

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Unique ID for the samples in the AMBER Collaborative Study.

tables.description: Subject ID, consent group, subject source, subject source ID, and affection status of participants with or without breast cancer and involved in the "The African American Breast Cancer Epidemiology and Risk (AMBER) Consortium Study" project.

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case-control status

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Unique ID for the subjects in the AMBER Collaborative Study.

variables.name: SUBJECT_SOURCE
variables.description: Source repository where subjects originate

variables.name: SUBJECT_SOURCE_ID
variables.description: Unique identifier for the AMBER Study

tables.description: Subject ID, sample ID, sample source, sample source ID, and sample use variable obtained from participants with or without breast cancer and involved in the "The African American Breast Cancer Epidemiology and Risk (AMBER) Consortium Study" project.

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Unique ID for the samples in the AMBER Collaborative Study.

variables.name: SAMPLE_SOURCE
variables.description: Source repository where samples originate

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE
variables.description: Sample Use

variables.name: SOURCE_SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: CIDR ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Unique ID for the subjects in the AMBER Collaborative Study.
